title: Raw Netherite Ore
description: This mod just adds new Netherite Ore to the Nether under Lava level
body:
# **Need more Netherite?**
That's good because this mod adds new way to optain this rare resource. Simply just dig under the lava level in the Nether to find new Raw Netherite Ore. Mine it with Diamond tier Pickaxe or higher to get Raw Netherite Chunk (also works with Fortune to get even more of it). Then simple craft 9 of them together to get Raw Netherite. Add one Gold Ingot to the Raw Netherite and smelt it to enjoy your brand new and shiny Netherite Ingot.
![All items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1eb92b1694d46a1c7e31ef5a558a269a950375b.png)

That's all items this mod adds
